name: Italian Mocha Espresso
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the instant coffee, sugar, nonfat dry milk, and cocoa.
2. Transfer the mixture to a blender and blend until it is smooth and powdered.
3. To make servings, use about 2 tablespoons of the mixture for each small cup filled with hot water.
4. Serve in demitasse cups.
5. This recipe makes approximately 7 cups of mix.
